title: NSFOCUS Threat Intelligence
description: The NSFOCUS Threat Intelligence (NTI) connector imports threat intelligence from the NSFOCUS Threat Intelligence feed into OpenCTI. NSFOCUS NTI provides indicators and threat data covering malicious IPs, domains, URLs, and file hashes linked to campaigns and adversary infrastructure.
short_description: Imports threat indicators and intelligence from the NSFOCUS Threat Intelligence (NTI) feed into OpenCTI.
